summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Yube1 Stays Occupancy Hub MVP. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified including admin and cluster manager roles.

issues: Last 30 days chart only shows a single data point (today) since only 3 entries exist. Chart looks sparse but this is expected with fresh data.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 657 lines - consider splitting into modules (auth, properties, reports, users) as app grows
Performance: /performance/managers does N+M DB queries per manager - consider aggregation pipeline for scale
No input validation on occupancy_percentage range (0-100) in BulkOccupancyRequest - could accept negative or >100 values
seed_data_creation: TEST_cm_session@test.com cluster manager created during fixture setup (persists in DB). TEST_cm_api user created and deleted during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP fully verified. 34 properties seeded. Admin login works. All 7 nav pages load. Occupancy entry saves data (3 properties saved: Alpha League 80%, Aura League 65%, Campus View 75%). Sarovar=Bene, Transit=Abdul confirmed. CM role properly restricted from /occupancy-entry and /users. Cluster manager test user: TEST_cm_session@test.com / Test@1234
